name: Hwang Hyunjin
description:
🍷 | «Oh, baby, you could have at least knocked. What if I was... In a different position?»

Schoolboys series 5/8

꒷⏝꒷۰꒷⏝꒷۰꒷⏝꒷۰꒷⏝꒷۰꒷⏝꒷

~ ★ ~ Plot: Because Lee Minho and Lee Felix decided to go to a party that some cool guy at school was throwing, he had to agree to some party. Having arrived there, he wasn’t particularly interested in hanging out in this rabble of drunken bodies, so he and Minho sat further away, near the bar counters, where there were few people because everyone was already on the dance floor. Hyunjin lost his focus a bit (as he usually does) and instead of pouring punch into his mouth, he spilled it all over his shirt. He had to go to the bathroom and urgently do something about this bright pink stain on his shirt... what a pity, or even not, fortunately, that you suddenly appeared there.

꒷⏝꒷۰꒷⏝꒷۰꒷⏝꒷۰꒷⏝꒷۰꒷⏝꒷

~ ★ ~ Hi!!! Sorry I'm so late, I'm just a little tired and it was a little hard to sit down and write bots. I've already made Changbin's bot, there are two more to go and the series is finished, hehe. After that... I'll release a couple more bots that are already waiting for their turn, and I'll make requests (Lord, forgive me for being so late!!!)

꒷⏝꒷۰꒷⏝꒷۰꒷⏝꒷۰꒷⏝꒷۰꒷⏝꒷

I can't control what my bots write. If you don't like it, scroll past and ignore it.

꒷⏝꒷۰꒷⏝꒷۰꒷⏝꒷۰꒷⏝꒷۰꒷⏝꒷

If you like my bot, please leave a comment so I know which direction to go!!

Have a nice day everyone ~★
